name: MakoUI
description: Immediate-mode desktop UI (Dear ImGui) - widgets, windows, menus, tables. Works as an in-game overlay or a standalone app window.

versions.name: MakoGUI
versions.description: The same package, for building a plain standalone desktop app - no game loop, no Mako2D/Mako3D window required. Call MakoUI.init(...) directly instead of MakoUI.attach().

name: Mako2D
description: 2D rendering - sprites, shapes, text, Camera2D, keyboard/mouse input.

name: Mako3D
description: 3D rendering - camera, primitives, models, a scene/object system, and Blender-style mesh editing.

versions.name: MakoVR
versions.description: VR headset support for Mako3D scenes - planned, not implemented yet.
versions.note: No VR runtime is wired up. Tracked as a future addition to Mako3D; there's nothing to install or use yet.

name: Models
description: Readable named .glb and .obj loading for 3D games. Turns on Mako3D automatically.

name: Players
description: Local multiplayer for players 1-4 with keyboard defaults, automatic gamepads, movement axes, and named actions.

name: Controllers
description: Named gamepad buttons, both sticks, controller names, and connection checks for players 1-4.

name: Save
description: Automatic per-user local save data, settings, progress, and named unlockables.

name: ANIX
description: Build safe ANIX Plan v1 JSON for Abora system configuration without privileged access.

name: Physics2D
description: One-call controllable slimes plus stable 2D rigid bodies, oriented boxes, adaptive substeps, sleeping, damped springs, friction, and contacts.

name: Inputs
description: Unified keyboard/mouse/gamepad polling, usable alongside any window (Mako2D, Mako3D, MakoUI).

name: Audio
description: Sound playback, music streaming, and synthesized tones/notes/melodies - no audio files required.

name: Net
description: HTTP requests (GET/POST) plus JSON encode/decode for talking to web APIs.
